issues: 1x silhouette too small to read clearly
white body blends into light background
swirl detail reads as noise at small size
reasoning: The 4x panels show a rounded potion bottle with a green/white swirl body, orange cork, and bottom sparkle effects — friendly toy charm is present and the shape passes the sticker test at 4x. Silhouette is a clean bottle-with-stopper form, soft and non-aggressive. However at 1x the sprite collapses into an unreadable smudge: the swirl pattern merges and only a vague bright blob survives. On the light/cream background the white body areas bleed into the background, reducing silhouette pop. Dark background contrast is solid. Charm score is decent (rounded, warm accent, personality in the swirl) but 1x legibility is the key failure point for an in-game item icon.
